response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development with a strong background in C and C++ (National Instruments) and Dlang (high-performance, embedded-friendly), but lacks recent C++ experience (last used ~8 years ago). His expertise is heavily skewed toward web and systems programming (TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than industrial automation or high-performance C++ systems. While he demonstrates strong architectural and problem-solving skills, his fit for the role's specific requirements (C++ STL, multi-threading, industrial cybersecurity, and on-prem/cloud industrial automation) is limited.
strengths: Strong background in C and C++ (National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI)
Proven ability to architect and build high-performance systems (Node.js, Dlang, low-latency apps)
Extensive experience with secure development practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development at RIDE Capital)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last used ~8 years ago for C components)
No demonstrated experience with STL, multi-threading, or message brokers (core role requirements)
Lack of exposure to industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850) or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards
